entities.name: COWPEA MILD MOTTLE VIRUS
entities.description: A virus transmitted by whiteflies that causes disease in groundnuts and other plants

entities.name: CPMMV-S
entities.description: A strain of cowpea mild mottle virus causing severe disease symptoms

entities.name: CPMMV-M
entities.description: A strain of cowpea mild mottle virus causing mild disease symptoms

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The host crop in which CPMMV strains cause disease symptoms

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the CPMMV strains were collected

entities.name: LEGUMINOSAE
entities.description: A plant family within the host range of CPMMV strains

entities.name: CHENOPODIACEAE
entities.description: A plant family within the host range of CPMMV strains

entities.name: WHITEFLY
entities.description: The insect vector that transmits cowpea mild mottle virus

entities.name: DISEASE SYMPTOMS
entities.description: The physical manifestations of CPMMV infection in host plants

entities.name: GENOMIC RNA
entities.description: The genetic material of the CPMMV strains

entities.name: OPEN READING FRAMES (ORFS)
entities.description: Sequences of RNA that can be translated into proteins

entities.name: P25
entities.description: One of the proteins encoded by the open reading frames of CPMMV

entities.name: P12
entities.description: One of the proteins encoded by the open reading frames of CPMMV

entities.name: P7
entities.description: One of the proteins encoded by the open reading frames of CPMMV

entities.name: P32
entities.description: The protein encoded by an ORF that forms the coat protein of CPMMV

entities.name: COAT PROTEIN
entities.description: The protein that forms the outer shell of the virus

entities.name: CARLAVIRUS
entities.description: The genus to which cowpea mild mottle virus is concluded to belong

entities.name: POTEXVIRUS
entities.description: A genus of viruses used for comparison with CPMMV

entities.name: PAIR-WISE COMPARISONS
entities.description: The technique used to compare amino acid sequences of proteins

entities.name: GENOME ORGANIZATION
entities.description: The structural arrangement of the viral genome
